top_signals.title: Two Saudi Oil Tankers Targeted as Houthi Blockade Disrupts Red Sea Shipping
top_signals.summary: At least two tankers have turned away from the Bab el-Mandeb Strait after Yemen’s Houthis said they have struck two Saudi tankers in the chokepoint in the latest Middle East war escalation, saying they had violated the naval blockade that the Yemeni forces declared earlier this week. According to reports, one of the tankers was loaded with Saudi crude for India and the other was carrying oil to China. “While it’s only two vessels so far, it suggests owners and operators are taking the threat seriously,” Matthew Wright, principal…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with Small Business Bank and announces termination enforcement actions with BNP Paribas S.A., BNP Paribas USA, Inc., BNP Paribas Securities Corp., and Community Bankshares, Inc.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Japanese retailers offer various eel products for Day of the Ox
top_signals.summary: Two major supermarket chains have cut prices for their mainstay grilled eel items after a bountiful fry catch last year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
